mapper.select: SELECT * FROM sp_permission WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = 0
SELECT * FROM sp_permission WHERE code = #{code} AND is_deleted = 0
SELECT * FROM sp_permission WHERE is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY parent_id ASC, sort_order ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sp_permission (id, name, code, module, type, description, parent_id, sort_order) VALUES (#{id}, #{name}, #{code}, #{module}, #{type}, #{description}, #{parentId}, #{sortOrder})
mapper.update: UPDATE sp_permission SET is_deleted = 1 WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sp_permission WHERE code = #{code} AND is_deleted = 0
